word: G36 - ἀγενής - agenḗs - ag-en-ace' - Base things

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
those who among men are held of no account;
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as negative particle) and G1085; properly without kin, that is, (of unknown descent, and by implication) ignoble: - base things.
